---
title: "Talian corpus"
---

Project by: <a href = "https://nataliaguzzo.github.io" target = "_blank">**Natália B. Guzzo**</a> and <a href="https://guilhermegarcia.github.io" target = "_blank">**Guilherme D. Garcia**</a>. Please, complete the form below to proceed.

---

<div align = "justify">

<!-- modify this form HTML and place wherever you want your form -->

<div id="ff-compose"></div>
<script async defer src="https://formfacade.com/include/114049531788298717046/form/1FAIpQLSd-HY_D_JR1nvJlDVRzdayYTyFwJ0y8qplaMWBgqMWKU9GEmQ/classic.js?div=ff-compose"></script>

</div>

---
